description:
DeskStretch reminds you to take a break and guides you through personalized stretch routines based on your pain areas.

Stop ignoring that neck pain. Stop forgetting to move. DeskStretch turns your phone into a smart break timer that knows you sit too long — and knows exactly what to stretch.

PERSONALIZED FOR YOUR PAIN AREAS
Select neck, lower back, shoulders, or wrists during setup. Every stretch routine is filtered to your specific pain areas, so you get targeted relief — not generic exercises.

SMART BREAK TIMER
Set break reminders at 30, 45, 60, or 90-minute intervals. When the timer fires, a notification guides you straight into a 1–3 minute stretch session. No friction. No excuses.

20+ DESK-SPECIFIC EXERCISES
A curated library of office-friendly stretches — no equipment needed, no floor required. Every exercise is described step-by-step with clear instructions you can follow right at your desk.

TRACK YOUR PROGRESS
See your daily stretch count, current streak, and total sessions completed. Build the habit with visual progress.

WORKS OFFLINE, COMPLETELY PRIVATE
No internet required. No data collection. No analytics. All data stays on your device.

FREE TO START
Try DeskStretch free. Premium unlocks unlimited stretches, all pain areas, custom schedules, and full progress history.

PREMIUM SUBSCRIPTION
• Monthly: $3.99/month
• Annual: $29.99/year (~$2.50/month, save 37%)
• 7-day free trial
• Cancel anytime

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions in your App Store account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://aniccaai.com/privacy
Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
keywords: desk stretching,break timer,back pain,office exercises,stretch reminder,posture,neck pain,wrist
